transactions.title: Register proof.node.agi.eth
transactions.description: Effective ENS ownership, expiry and PARENT_CANNOT_CONTROL fuse are checked before activation.

transactions.description: Effective ENS ownership, expiry and PARENT_CANNOT_CONTROL fuse are checked before activation.

transactions.description: Effective ENS ownership, expiry and PARENT_CANNOT_CONTROL fuse are checked before activation.

transactions.title: Approve exact job escrow
transactions.description: Employer approves only the 1,000 $AGIALPHA payout.

args: Bounded enterprise AI procurement proof mission · L3 external-review-ready
transactions.title: Create and escrow Job 0
transactions.description: Valid URI, payout and duration pass; exact-transfer semantics lock the full escrow.

action.details: Bounded enterprise AI procurement proof mission · L3 external-review-ready

args.details: Bounded enterprise AI procurement proof mission · L3 external-review-ready

transactions.title: Approve exact agent bond
transactions.description: BondMath computes 53.024 $AGIALPHA from payout, 5% bps, minimum and duration premium.

transactions.title: Apply as Atlas Evidence Agent
transactions.description: ENS ownership authorizes the direct alpha.agent.agi.eth label; the 82% AGI NFT payout is snapshotted.

transactions.title: Approve worker authority bond
transactions.description: Separate GoalOS reference overlay approval: 20 $AGIALPHA.

transactions.title: Lock worker bond
transactions.description: Reference authority-transition bond is bound to one mission and policy; this is separate from AGIJobManager bond accounting.

transactions.title: Approve validator authority bond
transactions.description: Separate GoalOS reference overlay approval: 10 $AGIALPHA.

transactions.title: Lock validator bond
transactions.description: Reference authority-transition bond is bound to one mission and policy; this is separate from AGIJobManager bond accounting.

transactions.title: Approve claim authority bond
transactions.description: Separate GoalOS reference overlay approval: 15 $AGIALPHA.

transactions.title: Lock claim bond
transactions.description: Reference authority-transition bond is bound to one mission and policy; this is separate from AGIJobManager bond accounting.

transactions.title: Approve reuse authority bond
transactions.description: Separate GoalOS reference overlay approval: 25 $AGIALPHA.

transactions.title: Lock reuse bond
transactions.description: Reference authority-transition bond is bound to one mission and policy; this is separate from AGIJobManager bond accounting.

transactions.title: Submit ProofBundle completion URI
transactions.description: The agent requests completion two simulated days after assignment; the URI is valid and within the job duration.

transactions.title: Bind final ProofBundle root
transactions.description: The worker bond was intentionally opened with a zero proof root and is now bound exactly once.

transactions.title: Approve proof validator bond
transactions.description: BondMath computes one shared per-vote bond of 150 $AGIALPHA.

transactions.title: Proof node: APPROVE
transactions.description: The validator is ENS-authorized under the club roots, posts the exact bond and records one non-repeatable vote.

transactions.title: Approve security validator bond
transactions.description: BondMath computes one shared per-vote bond of 150 $AGIALPHA.

transactions.title: Security node: APPROVE
transactions.description: The validator is ENS-authorized under the club roots, posts the exact bond and records one non-repeatable vote.

transactions.title: Approve commercial validator bond
transactions.description: BondMath computes one shared per-vote bond of 150 $AGIALPHA.

transactions.title: Commercial node: APPROVE
transactions.description: The validator is ENS-authorized under the club roots, posts the exact bond and records one non-repeatable vote.

transactions.title: Approve redteam validator bond
transactions.description: BondMath computes one shared per-vote bond of 150 $AGIALPHA.

transactions.title: Redteam node: DISAPPROVE
transactions.description: The validator is ENS-authorized under the club roots, posts the exact bond and records one non-repeatable vote.

transactions.title: Permissionless finalization after challenge window
transactions.description: The simulation advances 1 day + 1 second. Three approvals exceed one disapproval, so the agent-win settlement path executes.

transactions.title: Lock terminal ENS job records
transactions.description: Anyone may request the non-fuse-burning terminal lock. Hook execution remains best-effort.

transactions.title: Grant Paid authority
transactions.description: The reference kernel checks the exact required bond-kind mask for Paid.

transactions.title: Grant Trusted authority
transactions.description: The reference kernel checks the exact required bond-kind mask for Trusted.

transactions.title: Grant ChallengeSafe authority
transactions.description: The reference kernel checks the exact required bond-kind mask for ChallengeSafe.

transactions.title: Grant Reusable authority
transactions.description: The reference kernel checks the exact required bond-kind mask for Reusable.

transactions.title: Release worker authority bond
transactions.description: No slash is imposed; the full reference-overlay bond is returned to its actor.

transactions.title: Release validator authority bond
transactions.description: No slash is imposed; the full reference-overlay bond is returned to its actor.

transactions.title: Release claim authority bond
transactions.description: No slash is imposed; the full reference-overlay bond is returned to its actor.

transactions.title: Release reuse authority bond
transactions.description: No slash is imposed; the full reference-overlay bond is returned to its actor.

transactions.title: Commit admitted Reality epoch
transactions.description: Commitment-only registry records the preregistration, Docket, institutional proof, Chronicle, skill and graph roots.

transactions.title: Record sponsor attestation
transactions.description: The sponsor attests to the bounded Governed Decision State; this does not silently expand its scope.

transactions.title: Submit proof-fabric checkpoint
transactions.description: The first checkpoint requires epoch 1 and a zero previous root; only compact commitments are stored.

transactions.title: Record Mission 2 as canary-only
transactions.description: The candidate does not receive broad propagation. It receives Decision.CanaryOnly pending delayed outcome and fresh transfer evidence.
